widgets.title: Top 5 Genres by Track Count
widgets.query: SELECT G.Name, COUNT(T.TrackId) FROM Genre G JOIN Track T ON G.GenreId = T.GenreId GROUP BY G.Name ORDER BY COUNT(T.TrackId) DESC LIMIT 5

widgets.title: Artist Distribution
widgets.query: SELECT A.Name, COUNT(Al.AlbumId) FROM Artist A JOIN Album Al ON A.ArtistId = Al.ArtistId GROUP BY A.Name ORDER BY COUNT(Al.AlbumId) DESC

widgets.title: Invoice Total by Country
widgets.query: SELECT C.Country, SUM(I.Total) FROM Customer C JOIN Invoice I ON C.CustomerId = I.CustomerId GROUP BY C.Country ORDER BY SUM(I.Total) DESC

widgets.title: Top 5 Customers by Invoice Total
widgets.query: SELECT C.FirstName, C.LastName, SUM(I.Total) FROM Customer C JOIN Invoice I ON C.CustomerId = I.CustomerId GROUP BY C.FirstName, C.LastName ORDER BY SUM(I.Total) DESC LIMIT 5

widgets.title: Recent Invoices
widgets.query: SELECT I.InvoiceId, I.InvoiceDate, C.FirstName, C.LastName, I.Total FROM Invoice I JOIN Customer C ON I.CustomerId = C.CustomerId ORDER BY I.InvoiceDate DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Track Count by MediaType
widgets.query: SELECT MT.Name, COUNT(T.TrackId) FROM MediaType MT JOIN Track T ON MT.MediaTypeId = T.MediaTypeId GROUP BY MT.Name ORDER BY COUNT(T.TrackId) DESC

widgets.title: Top 5 Countries by Total Orders
widgets.query: SELECT BillingCountry, SUM(Total) AS TotalOrders FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry ORDER BY TotalOrders DESC LIMIT 5

widgets.title: Customer Distribution by Genre
widgets.query: SELECT G.Name, COUNT(DISTINCT C.CustomerId) AS CustomerCount FROM Customer C JOIN Invoice I ON C.CustomerId = I.CustomerId JOIN InvoiceLine IL ON I.InvoiceId = IL.InvoiceId JOIN Track T ON IL.TrackId = T.TrackId JOIN Genre G ON T.GenreId = G.GenreId GROUP BY G.Name ORDER BY CustomerCount DESC

widgets.title: Order History by Month
widgets.query: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate) AS Month, SUM(Total) AS TotalOrders FROM Invoice GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

widgets.title: Recent Orders
widgets.query: SELECT C.FirstName, C.LastName, I.InvoiceDate, I.Total FROM Customer C JOIN Invoice I ON C.CustomerId = I.CustomerId ORDER BY I.InvoiceDate DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Top 5 Artists by Total Sales
widgets.query: SELECT A.Name, SUM(IL.UnitPrice * IL.Quantity) AS TotalSales FROM Artist A JOIN Album Al ON A.ArtistId = Al.ArtistId JOIN Track T ON Al.AlbumId = T.AlbumId JOIN InvoiceLine IL ON T.TrackId = IL.TrackId JOIN Invoice I ON IL.InvoiceId = I.InvoiceId GROUP BY A.Name ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 5

widgets.title: Top 5 Genres by Total Sales
widgets.query: SELECT g.Name, SUM(i.Total) AS TotalSales FROM Invoice i JOIN InvoiceLine il ON i.InvoiceId = il.InvoiceId JOIN Track t ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId GROUP BY g.Name ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 5

widgets.title: Genre Distribution
widgets.query: SELECT g.Name, COUNT(t.TrackId) AS TrackCount FROM Genre g JOIN Track t ON g.GenreId = t.GenreId GROUP BY g.Name

widgets.title: Genre Sales Over Time
widgets.query: SELECT i.InvoiceDate, SUM(i.Total) AS TotalSales FROM Invoice i JOIN InvoiceLine il ON i.InvoiceId = il.InvoiceId JOIN Track t ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId WHERE g.Name = 'Rock' GROUP BY i.InvoiceDate ORDER BY i.InvoiceDate

widgets.title: Top 10 Tracks by Genre
widgets.query: SELECT t.Name, g.Name AS Genre, SUM(il.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity FROM Track t JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId GROUP BY t.Name, g.Name ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Genre Sales by Country
widgets.query: SELECT c.Country, SUM(i.Total) AS TotalSales FROM Invoice i JOIN Customer c ON i.CustomerId = c.CustomerId JOIN InvoiceLine il ON i.InvoiceId = il.InvoiceId JOIN Track t ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId GROUP BY c.Country ORDER BY TotalSales DESC

widgets.title: Total Revenue by Country
widgets.query: SELECT BillingCountry, SUM(Total) FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry ORDER BY SUM(Total) DESC

widgets.title: Revenue Distribution by Country
widgets.query: SELECT BillingCountry, SUM(Total) FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry ORDER BY SUM(Total) DESC

widgets.title: Revenue by Country and Customer
widgets.query: SELECT c.Country, c.FirstName, c.LastName, SUM(i.Total) FROM Customer c JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId GROUP BY c.Country, c.FirstName, c.LastName ORDER BY SUM(i.Total) DESC

widgets.title: Revenue Trend by Country
widgets.query: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', InvoiceDate) AS Year, BillingCountry, SUM(Total) FROM Invoice GROUP BY STRFTIME('%Y', InvoiceDate), BillingCountry ORDER BY STRFTIME('%Y', InvoiceDate), SUM(Total) DESC

widgets.title: Top 5 Countries by Revenue
widgets.query: SELECT BillingCountry, SUM(Total) FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry ORDER BY SUM(Total) DESC LIMIT 5

widgets.title: Top 10 Tracks by Total Sales
widgets.query: SELECT T.Name, SUM(IL.Quantity) AS TotalSales FROM Track T JOIN InvoiceLine IL ON T.TrackId = IL.TrackId GROUP BY T.Name ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Top 5 Genres by Total Sales
widgets.query: SELECT G.Name, SUM(IL.UnitPrice * IL.Quantity) AS TotalSales FROM Genre G JOIN Track T ON G.GenreId = T.GenreId JOIN InvoiceLine IL ON T.TrackId = IL.TrackId GROUP BY G.Name ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 5

widgets.title: Top 10 Albums by Total Sales
widgets.query: SELECT A.Title, SUM(IL.Quantity) AS TotalSales FROM Album A JOIN Track T ON A.AlbumId = T.AlbumId JOIN InvoiceLine IL ON T.TrackId = IL.TrackId GROUP BY A.Title ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Top Artists by Total Album Sales
widgets.query: SELECT AR.Name, SUM(IL.Quantity) AS TotalSales FROM Artist AR JOIN Album A ON AR.ArtistId = A.ArtistId JOIN Track T ON A.AlbumId = T.AlbumId JOIN InvoiceLine IL ON T.TrackId = IL.TrackId GROUP BY AR.Name ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Top 10 Tracks with Details
widgets.query: SELECT T.Name, A.Title, G.Name, IL.UnitPrice, IL.Quantity FROM Track T JOIN Album A ON T.AlbumId = A.AlbumId JOIN Genre G ON T.GenreId = G.GenreId JOIN InvoiceLine IL ON T.TrackId = IL.TrackId ORDER BY IL.Quantity DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Top 10 Tracks by Sales
widgets.query: SELECT T.Name, SUM(IL.Quantity) AS TotalSales FROM InvoiceLine IL JOIN Track T ON IL.TrackId = T.TrackId WHERE IL.InvoiceId IN (SELECT InvoiceId FROM Invoice WHERE InvoiceDate > DATE('now', '-4 weeks')) GROUP BY T.Name ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Top Genres by Sales
widgets.query: SELECT G.Name, SUM(IL.Quantity) AS TotalSales FROM InvoiceLine IL JOIN Track T ON IL.TrackId = T.TrackId JOIN Genre G ON T.GenreId = G.GenreId WHERE IL.InvoiceId IN (SELECT InvoiceId FROM Invoice WHERE InvoiceDate > DATE('now', '-4 weeks')) GROUP BY G.Name ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 5

widgets.title: Top Artists by Sales
widgets.query: SELECT A.Name, SUM(IL.Quantity) AS TotalSales FROM InvoiceLine IL JOIN Track T ON IL.TrackId = T.TrackId JOIN Album Al ON T.AlbumId = Al.AlbumId JOIN Artist A ON Al.ArtistId = A.ArtistId WHERE IL.InvoiceId IN (SELECT InvoiceId FROM Invoice WHERE InvoiceDate > DATE('now', '-4 weeks')) GROUP BY A.Name ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 5

widgets.title: Top Tracks by Revenue
widgets.query: SELECT T.Name, SUM(IL.UnitPrice * IL.Quantity) AS TotalRevenue FROM InvoiceLine IL JOIN Track T ON IL.TrackId = T.TrackId WHERE IL.InvoiceId IN (SELECT InvoiceId FROM Invoice WHERE InvoiceDate > DATE('now', '-4 weeks')) GROUP BY T.Name ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Top Tracks Data Table
widgets.query: SELECT T.Name, IL.Quantity, IL.UnitPrice, I.InvoiceDate FROM InvoiceLine IL JOIN Track T ON IL.TrackId = T.TrackId JOIN Invoice I ON IL.InvoiceId = I.InvoiceId WHERE I.InvoiceDate > DATE('now', '-4 weeks') ORDER BY IL.Quantity DESC LIMIT 20
